title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following changes that companies could make to improve the working lives of their employees, then decide which two would have the greatest positive impact.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some changes companies could make to improve employees' working lives.
Now decide which two changes would have the greatest positive impact on employees' wellbeing.
